data.title: Dow Jones up on unexpected jobless claims, Snowflake stock down on earnings. Market update: 24-hour live coverage.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase due to a surprising decrease in weekly jobless claims. However, artificial intelligence stock Snowflake saw a significant drop in its value following its earnings report. The Dow Jones rising signifies positive movement in the market, whereas Snowflake's decline is attributed to its earnings performance. This information is indicative of the current trend in the stock market, showcasing the impact of economic indicators on individual stock performance. Overall, these fluctuations demonstrate the dynamic nature of the market and the influence of various factors on stock prices.

data.title: Dollar Tree beats Q3 earnings, reports $1.21 EPS (+12% estimate), $4.746B sales (+9.4% YoY). CEO credits multi-price strategy.
data.description: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) announced robust financial results for the third quarter, surpassing expectations. Their quarterly adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.21, exceeding the anticipated $1.08. The company experienced a significant uptick in quarterly sales, reaching $4.746 billion, a notable 9.4% increase compared to the previous year. This figure also outperformed the estimated $4.699 billion. CEO Mike Creedon attributed the success to their multi-price strategy, which boosted overall business performance and led to a record-breaking Halloween season. Creedon highlighted that 85% of their products are priced at $2 or less, emphasizing the exceptional value they provide. The varied pricing structure enables Dollar Tree to offer a wide range of high-quality goods and attractive gift selections to customers.

data.title: Polymarket re-enters US market with CFTC approval after $1.4 million settlement; insider pockets $1 million on Google Trends market.
data.description: Polymarket has been granted approval by the CFTC to re-enter the US market with a regulated betting app, introducing a market focusing on Google's most-searched person in 2025 amid suspicions of insider involvement. This marks Polymarket's first return to the US since a 2022 enforcement action resulting in a $1.4 million settlement and a ban on US users due to operating unregistered event-based derivatives. The company later acquired a regulated derivatives exchange to meet compliance standards and received a no-action letter in September 2024, enabling a supervised comeback under federal oversight. Polymarket's iOS rollout will prioritize sports markets, with Android support to follow, and plans to introduce proposition and election markets post-launch as part of its long-term roadmap.

data.title: Trading platform OKX adds margin services and loans for 2Z, ZORA, and VIRTUAL tokens to improve options for users.
data.description: OKX will be introducing margin trading, Simple Earn, and Flexible Loan services for 2Z, ZORA, and VIRTUAL tokens. This move is expected to significantly broaden its trading options for users.

data.title: Brad Jackson of Hamilton Wingo in Dallas enters Best Lawyers in Dallas Hall of Fame after 15 years in publication.
data.description: In Dallas on December 4, 2025, the publishers of D Magazine announced the induction of attorney Brad Jackson from Dallas plaintiffs' law firm Hamilton Wingo into the Best Lawyers in Dallas Hall of Fame. This honor comes after Jackson's remarkable achievement of being featured in the publication for 15 consecutive years.

data.title: Discount retailers like Dollar Tree, Five Below, and Dollar General exceed analyst expectations, with Dollar General experiencing a stock surge and Dollar Tree poised for significant growth.
data.description: Earnings reports from Dollar Tree, Five Below, and Dollar General have exceeded analyst expectations by a significant margin. Dollar General's stock has experienced a surge, while Dollar Tree's shares are poised for a breakout. The robust performance of these discount retailers has caught the attention of investors and analysts alike. This success indicates a strong financial status and profitability for these companies.

data.title: ABC announces 2026-2027 Cardiac Electrophysiology Fellowship recipients to support outstanding physicians in advanced training.
data.description: The Association of Black Cardiologists has recently revealed the winners of the 2026-2027 Cardiac Electrophysiology (EP) Fellowship Support Awards in a statement released in Washington on December 4, 2025. These awards aim to acknowledge exceptional physicians who are dedicated to enhancing their skills in cardiac subspecialty training.

data.title: Mopar offers wide range of gift ideas for automotive enthusiasts; includes apparel, merchandise, accessories, and parts.
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on December 4, 2025, a diverse selection of Mopar apparel, branded products, accessories, and performance parts is now accessible for all automotive enthusiasts. Mopar simplifies holiday shopping for car lovers by offering a vast selection of gift options, catering to various preferences. This selection includes an assortment of products suitable for any automotive enthusiast, providing gift ideas for those interested in automotive-related items.

data.title: Investigation launched into Klarna (KLAR) over 102% spike in credit loss provision risk tied to fair financing growth.
data.description: Investigator Reed Kathrein is currently examining allegations regarding possible misrepresentation by management of Klarna Group plc's provision trends and lending risk. The investigation, launched by shareholder rights firm Hagens Berman based in San Francisco, is looking into potential securities law violations by Klarna Group plc. The probe aims to assess if there were any discrepancies in the company's disclosures related to provision trends and lending risk. This investigation was initiated on December 4, 2025.

data.title: CarbonZero.Eco launches biochar plant and secures carbon credit deal with Climeworks, advancing regenerative agriculture.
data.description: In Colusa County, California, on December 4, 2025, CarbonZero.Eco, a climate technology startup from Silicon Valley, revealed the opening of its initial commercial biochar production facility. The company, funded by venture capitalists, specializes in regenerative agriculture and carbon removal via biochar.

data.title: Global 4D Printing in Healthcare market expected to reach USD 14240M by 2034 at 84.6% CAGR, starting from USD 19M in 2024.
data.description: The article discusses the growing market for 4D printing in healthcare, highlighting its potential in biomedical engineering, personalized medicine, and the integration of smart materials and biocompatible polymers. The market size was approximately USD 19 million in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 25 million in 2025, with a projected value of around USD 14,240 million by 2034 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 84.6%. Key trends include advancements in smart materials, personalized and regenerative medicine, and the integration of artificial intelligence in design optimization. The report covers various components, technologies, applications, end-users, and regions in the market. The use of 4D printing is expected to revolutionize the healthcare industry by providing innovative solutions that adapt to patient-specific needs, improving surgical precision, organ replacement, and overall clinical outcomes.

data.title: EV finance transactions increase as EV tax credit ends in Q3 2025, according to Experian Automotive data.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, there was a surge in EV finance transactions in the third quarter of 2025 as the EV tax credit was set to expire at the end of September. The market experienced a notable rise in the number of transactions involving electric vehicles due to this impending deadline.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer introduces Advanced Compounding module for Simplifi 797, aiding complex pharmacies with USP 797 compliance.
data.description: A new Advanced Compounding module has been introduced by Wolters Kluwer Health in Waltham, Mass. The module is designed for Simplifi 797 and aims to assist pharmacies in meeting the 2023 USP Chapter 797 requirements. This solution offers comprehensive support for various compounding needs, including high-risk sterile processes, advanced batch tracking, and beyond-use dating. By providing an all-in-one closed-loop system, pharmacies can effectively manage complex compounding tasks. The module is accompanied by enhanced documentation and educational resources to promote adherence to industry best practices outlined in USP Chapter 797.

data.title: EU's plan aims to enhance ESMA's oversight in cryptocurrency and capital markets. Proposal for "European SEC" laid in 2023.
data.description: Two years prior to the recent official proposal, ECB President Christine Lagarde suggested the establishment of a European equivalent of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in 2023. The aim is to broaden the supervisory powers of the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) in the region.
